title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCI. Lullabies.
content:
[From Yorkshire. A nursery-cry.]

        Rabbit, Rabbit, Rabbit-Pie!
        Come, my ladies, come and buy;
        Else your babies they will cry.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCI. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
